name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Characteristic_Duration
title: R5: Length of time in which the characteristic is met (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.duration[x]` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.characteristic.duration[x]` 0..1 `Quantity, Range`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.duration[x]` 0..1 `Quantity, Range`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.duration[x]` has a context of EvidenceVariable.characteristic based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.duration[x]` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Length of time in which the characteristic is met (new)
